Turn your photos into a dreamy doodle scrapbook 

It adds hand-drawn notes, tiny hearts, stars, swirls, and cozy energy. Happy weekend 🥹🧡🫶 from California! 

I’d love to see  your experiments if you try it 

prompt 👇 https://t.co/nwCExCa3RO

Prompt: 
Ultra-Realistic Hand-drawn pastel doodles layered over the image: sketchy outlines, swirls, arrows, stars, hearts, and playful handwritten notes in a messy casual style. Soft dreamy sunrise glow with subtle window light and water reflections, clean morning aesthetic,

I’m really enjoying this scrapbooking prompt 

Just arrived in San Francisco and took this photo and added some doodles https://t.co/MNGJCt5nUC
